name: Farmers & Merchants Bank Of Craig County
description_short: Independent community bank in Craig County, Virginia offering online and mobile banking services to local customers with a hometown focus.
description_long:
Farmers & Merchants Bank of Craig County is an independent full-service bank headquartered in New Castle, Craig County, Virginia. The institution operates as the only independent full-service bank in the county, positioning itself as a dedicated community lender for the local area. The bank maintains a physical presence in New Castle while also offering modern digital banking capabilities to serve customers in their preferred way.

The bank offers standard banking services including online banking, mobile banking through the FMB Craig App, and mobile deposit functionality. Customers can enroll in online banking to access their accounts remotely, download the mobile app for banking anywhere and anytime, and submit check deposits via mobile device by taking a picture of the check. Account holders can reach the bank directly at 540-864-5156 for enrollment and customer support inquiries.

What distinguishes Farmers & Merchants Bank of Craig County is its explicit commitment to the hometown community model. The bank emphasizes personal, dependable service to every customer and balances traditional small-town banking atmosphere with modern internet and mobile banking capabilities. As the sole independent full-service bank in Craig County, it serves as the primary banking option for local residents and businesses seeking community-focused financial services.

The bank operates with standard community banking limitations. Its service area appears concentrated in Craig County, Virginia, limiting accessibility for customers outside the region. The website encountered technical errors when attempting to access the About Us page, suggesting potential website maintenance issues. As a small community bank, the institution likely offers a narrower range of specialized financial products compared to larger regional or national banks. Many banks offer installment loans with fixed monthly payments, giving borrowers a clear payoff timeline.
services: In-person banking at New Castle location
pros: Only independent full-service bank in Craig County, Virginia
Mobile deposit capability available through FMB Craig App
Online banking and mobile banking platforms for remote account access
Personal, dependable service model focused on individual customer needs
Combines hometown community banking atmosphere with modern digital services
Local decision-making as an independent institution
Direct phone support available at 540-864-5156 for enrollment and assistance
cons: Limited geographic service area restricted to Craig County region
Website technical issues and errors on informational pages
Limited product information available online; many details require calling
Small institution may offer fewer specialized services than larger banks
No clear information about rates, fees, or account types on accessible website sections
best_for: Craig County, Virginia residents seeking local banking relationships
Small business owners in the local community needing personal service
Customers who prefer independent banks over national chains
Mobile banking users who want deposit services on-the-go
diagnosis: Best for Craig County, Virginia residents and local business owners seeking community-focused banking with modern digital conveniences. Primary caveat: severely limited geographic service area and sparse online information about specific products, rates, and fees require direct contact with the bank for details.
typical_results_timeline: Account opening typically takes 1-3 business days. Loan decisions vary by product.
